headline: You Don’t Need a Powerball Jackpot To Build A $5,000 Monthly Dividend Paycheck
summary: The latest Powerball jackpot stood at roughly $269 million, with a cash option of about $120.5 million before taxes. That would solve all your financial problems, but the odds are not great: roughly 1 in 292 million. If your goal is simply to create a $5,000 monthly dividend paycheck, however, a Powerball win is the ... You Don’t Need a Powerball Jackpot To Build A $5,000 Monthly Dividend Paycheck

headline: Bank of America Sees Interest Rates Exploding Higher Soon: Play It Safe With 4 Dividend Giants
summary: Bank of America has predicted that the Federal Reserve will be forced to raise interest rates by 75 basis points this year, with the first 25-basis-point hike in September. They also see additional 25-basis-point hikes in October and December. The energy shock from the war with Iran drove inflation higher, with the CPI rising in ... Bank of America Sees Interest Rates Exploding Higher Soon: Play It Safe With 4 Dividend Giants
